case.title: MERCANTILE BANK v. TENNESSEE AND SHELBY COUNTY

opinion.h1: MERCANTILE BANK v. TENNESSEE AND SHELBY COUNTY, 161 U.S. 173 (1896)
opinion.h2: MERCANTILE BANK et al. v. STATE OF TENNESSEE, to Use of CITY OF MEMPHIS. No. 677.
opinion.p: MERCANTILE BANK v. TENNESSEE AND SHELBY COUNTY No. 677, by stipulation, abides the event in the foregoing case found at 161 U.S. 161, 16 S. Ct. 461.
